content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Petr#". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/113/problem/B
constraints: The length of each word is at most 10 characters
Each word contains only lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of words. Then n lines follow, each containing a word.
content.outputFormat: The output should contain the number of pairs of words that are anagrams of each other.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a hashmap to store the sorted characters of each word and their frequencies
